original: At a glance, this hexweave dress looks like a hybridized design featuring hexagonal armor plating, but a closer look lets you see the truth: artful craftsmanship that weaves together multiple kinds of fabrics and circuitries to create a dress full of sweeping curves and sharp angles you won’t find on any other planet. As an added bonus, the edges of the hexagons can be set to illuminate your surroundings.
